articles.author: Ben Finley, Sam Metz
articles.title: Seizing Kharg Island would risk US troops’ lives and may not end Iran war, experts say - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump is threatening to deploy ground troops to seize critical oil infrastructure on Iran’s Kharg Island. It's a military gambit that experts say would risk American lives and could still fail to end the war. Trump has said he could hobble Ir…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) President Donald Trump is threatening to deploy ground troops to seize critical oil infrastructure on Irans Kharg Island, a military gambit that experts say would risk American lives … [+6746 chars]
